images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese gravure idol, captured in a surreal fusion of tradition and modernity amidst a cherry blossom season. She wears a sleek, form-fitting black neoprene wetsuit that accentuates her slim waist and curvy figure, the glossy texture contrasting with the delicate pink petals falling around her. From a high-angle drone aerial view, she stands on a sun-drenched forest pathway, clutching a designer handbag while tilting her head up with a whispering secret expression, her large expressive eyes gazing softly upward. The lighting is a bright, direct flash style, illuminating her flawless skin texture and silky black hair with ethereal clarity, casting no heavy shadows. The background is a vibrant, colorful blur of blooming sakura trees, creating a dreamy, angelic atmosphere. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
